# Scrap Auction India

> Public auction discovery for Indian scrap and industrial lots (MSTC, GeM Forward, eAuction.gov.in).
> Discovery only — bidding and payments happen only on official source portals.

## What this site is

Scrap Auction India aggregates public forward-auction listings so buyers and agents can search, filter, and research lots. We are not a bidding platform.

## Sources

- MSTC (mstcecommerce)
- GeM Forward auctions
- eAuction.gov.in

## Start here (HTML)

- Home: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/
- MSTC: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/mstc-auctions/
- GeM Forward: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/gem-forward-auctions/
- eAuction: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/eauction-gov-in/
- Developers: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/developers/
- HTML sitemap index: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/sitemap.xml

## HTML start URLs (crawlable cards in raw HTML)

- Aluminium: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/aluminium-scrap/
- Metal scrap: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/metal-scrap/
- Large lots: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/large-scrap-lots/
- Closing soon: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/closing-soon/
- Auction archive (T-30 short-window + recently closed): https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/archive/

## Machine / agent entrypoints (not in Google sitemap)

- Manifest: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/api/manifest.json
- Schema: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/api/schema.json
- Latest auctions: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/api/latest.json
- Closing soon: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/api/closing-soon.json
- Search index (filter locally): https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/api/search-index.json
- Topic feeds: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/api/search/aluminium.json
  also copper.json, vehicle-scrap.json, large-lots.json, closing-soon.json
- Archive latest (T-30): https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/api/archive/latest.json
- Archive search index: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/api/archive/search-index.json
- One auction: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/api/auction/{source}/{id}.json
  (source = mstc | gem-forward | eauction)
- One archive auction: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/api/archive/auction/{source}/{id}.json
- Feeds: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/feeds/latest.json
- Machine URL list: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/machine-sitemap.xml
- Full agent docs: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/llms-full.txt

There is **no** dynamic query-string search API on this static host. Download search-index or a topic feed and filter offline.

## Usage rules

- Use for discovery, research, and tooling.
- Always verify quantity, EMD, location, and closing on the official portal before bidding.
- Do not treat this site as a bid execution channel.
- Bulk app data under /auctions/data/ is not a public crawler API.

## Crawler note

Search bots (Googlebot, Bingbot, Applebot, OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, PerplexityBot) and training crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot) are allowed on /auctions/ by design for AI visibility. /auctions/data/ remains disallowed.

## Contact

- Support: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/support/
- Status / import health: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/status/
